items.headline: **Bago: Bukas ang Mag 7 earnings week sa 4/27 na may Iran/Hormuz futures slip (D
items.diff_narrative: **Bago: Bukas ang Mag 7 earnings week sa 4/27 na may Iran/Hormuz futures slip (Dow -0.17%) — 5 sa 7 ang mag-uulat sa 4/29-30** — Nagtapos ang nakaraang report sa 4/24 NVDA $5.12T retake / AMD +13.9% / Intel +24% sa isang araw. Ngayon, **ang 4/27 futures-cap-tape ay nagsisilbing gate sa Q1 prints** kung saan ang pinagsamang 2026 capex commentary mula sa Alphabet / Amazon / Meta / Microsoft ay nag-frame sa buong "AI ROI" debate. Mag-uulat ang Apple sa 4/30. **Bumalik ang geopolitical risk (Hormuz closure, Iran ceasefire stall) bilang tape-mover** sa unang pagkakataon mula noong 4/21.

items.headline: **Bago: Hermes Agent v0.11.0 (4/23) "Interface" — buong React/Ink TUI, native AW
items.diff_narrative: **Bago: Hermes Agent v0.11.0 (4/23) "Interface" — buong React/Ink TUI, native AWS Bedrock, GPT-5.5 via Codex OAuth, 1,556 commits / 761 PRs mula sa 29 contributors** — Sinabi ng nakaraang report na "Hermes Agent — walang bagong release sa loob ng 4/23-26 (continued post-v0.10.0 activity)." Mali iyon: **na-ship ang v0.11.0 noong 4/23** na may Ink-based React rewrite ng interactive CLI, pluggable transport architecture, 5 bagong inference paths, ika-17 messaging platform (QQBot), shell hooks lifecycle system, webhook direct-delivery mode, configurable subagent orchestrator na may file-coordination layer. **>95,600 GitHub stars sa loob ng 7 linggo**.

items.headline: **Bago: Sam Altman vs Anthropic Mythos "fear-based marketing" exchange (4/21, lu
items.diff_narrative: **Bago: Sam Altman vs Anthropic Mythos "fear-based marketing" exchange (4/21, lumalala 4/25-27) + 4/16 attacks sa bahay ni Altman + Mythos contractor-URL leak via Discord** — Saklaw ng nakaraang report ang Anthropic engineering postmortem sa 4/23 Claude Code regression. Ngayon, **nagtatagpo ang AI-public-opinion + frontier-lab-cap-table-coupling thesis sa lumalalang backlash**: Inakusahan ni Sam Altman ang Anthropic ng "selling a bomb shelter while threatening to drop a bomb"; physical attacks sa bahay ni Altman (4/16, prior); kinumpirma ng Bloomberg na nakakuha ng access ang isang private Discord forum sa Mythos sa pamamagitan ng contractor + URL-pattern guessing. Quinantify ng CNBC 4/15 ang lumalamig na public opinion sa AI/datacenters papasok sa IPO season.

items.headline: **Bago: CVE-2026-7037 Totolink A8000RU OS command injection (CVSS 9.8) — public
items.diff_narrative: **Bago: CVE-2026-7037 Totolink A8000RU OS command injection (CVSS 9.8) — public PoC + CVE-2026-6951 simple-git RCE (CVSS 9.8) tumama sa foundational CI/CD dep noong 4/26** — Saklaw ng nakaraang report ang SGLang CVE-2026-5760, ASP.NET Core CVE-2026-40372, at ang Pillar Antigravity sandbox-escape. Ngayon, idinagdag ng 4/26 daily roll-up ang **CVE-2026-7037 (Totolink A8000RU pptpPassThru OS-command-injection, public exploit available)** at **CVE-2026-6951 (simple-git Node.js RCE sa malawakang naka-deploy na CI/CD library, foundational dep sa hindi mabilang na pipelines)**. Idinagdag naman ng 4/27 ang **CVE-2026-33277 (LogonTracer OS-command-injection, CVSS 8.8)** at **CVE-2026-42363 (GeoVision GV-IP Device Utility credential leak, CVSS 9.3)**.

items.headline: **Bago: Project Glasswing roster confirmed sa 12 launch partners + 40 critical-i
items.diff_narrative: **Bago: Project Glasswing roster confirmed sa 12 launch partners + 40 critical-infrastructure orgs** — Hindi inenumerate ng nakaraang report. Ngayon kumpirmado: **AWS, Apple, Broadcom, Cisco, CrowdStrike, Google, JPMorganChase, Linux Foundation, Microsoft, NVIDIA, Palo Alto Networks, Anthropic**, kasama ang 40 karagdagang orgs na nagmamantine ng critical software infrastructure. Pinaalalahanan ng ProMarket (4/22) ang antitrust risk.

items.headline: **Bago: AI Dev 26 x SF (4/28-29) sa Pier 48 confirmed na may 3,000+ devs na hino
items.diff_narrative: **Bago: AI Dev 26 x SF (4/28-29) sa Pier 48 confirmed na may 3,000+ devs na hino-host ni Andrew Ng** — Generikong nailista ng nakaraang report ang AI Dev 26 + AI Tinkerers VIP dinner. Ngayon kumpirmado ang venue + scale + curriculum: **Pier 48 Shed A Mission Bay**; mga track sa **Agentic AI, Context Engineering, Multimodal AI Apps, AI Governance, Coding-with-AI**; kasama ang **AI Startup Track**. Lumagpak ang Stanford Causal Science Conference: Frontiers in AI Evaluation sa 4/29.

items.headline: **Bago: Okta for AI Agents GA sa 4/30 (3 araw mula sa 4/27 dateline) — pre-GA bl
items.diff_narrative: **Bago: Okta for AI Agents GA sa 4/30 (3 araw mula sa 4/27 dateline) — pre-GA blueprint reaffirmed** — Saklaw ng nakaraang report ang Okta GA timing. 4/27 = **3-day countdown**: Agent Discovery & Governance (sanctioned + shadow agents), Agent Gateway bilang central MCP control plane (virtual MCP server na nag-aaggregate ng Okta MCP registry), credential vaulting + auto-rotation, universal-logout runtime enforcement.

items.headline: **Tuluy-tuloy: nag-eextend ang OpenClaw v2026.4.25-beta train (4/26 beta.3 → bet
items.diff_narrative: **Tuluy-tuloy: nag-eextend ang OpenClaw v2026.4.25-beta train (4/26 beta.3 → beta.4 → beta.7+) hanggang 4/27** — Nagtapos ang nakaraang report sa OpenClaw v2026.4.25-beta beta.7+ noong hapon ng 4/26. Continuation: voice-stack hardening, browser-automation safe-tab URLs, CDP-native role-snapshot fallback, CLI image-gen --background option, Discord voice channels.discord.voice.model override, plugin-onboarding install-record preservation. Tuluy-tuloy ang sub-24h beta cadence.

items.headline: **Tuluy-tuloy: DeepSeek V4-Pro / V4-Flash — lumalago ang Hugging Face traction s
items.diff_narrative: **Tuluy-tuloy: DeepSeek V4-Pro / V4-Flash — lumalago ang Hugging Face traction sa 4/25-27, ang piece ni Simon Willison noong 4/24 na "almost on the frontier, a fraction of the price"** — Saklaw ng nakaraang report ang V4 launch + Bloomberg-via-CCTV Huawei Ascend tuning. Ngayon, ang 4/24 deep-read ni Simon Willison na "DeepSeek V4 — almost on the frontier, a fraction of the price" ang nananatiling canonical practitioner reference sa 4/25-27. Live na ang V4-Pro Hugging Face page.
